name: Arlong Park
description: Arlong Park was the fortress headquarters of the fish-man pirate Arlong, built on Cocoyasi Village in the Conomi Islands. For eight years, Arlong and his crew terrorized the islands, demanding tribute money and enslaving Nami to create sea charts. The fortress became a symbol of oppression until the Straw Hats destroyed it and liberated the islands.
history: Cocoyasi Village was a peaceful island until Arlong arrived from the Grand Line eight years before the main story. He killed Nami's adoptive mother Bellemere when she couldn't pay the tribute, then enslaved young Nami to draw maps. Arlong built his fortress and ruled through fear and violence, corrupting a Marine officer to maintain control. The villagers, including Nami, saved desperately for eight years trying to buy their freedom, only for Arlong to betray the deal. When Luffy arrived and learned of Nami's suffering, he destroyed Arlong Park and freed the islands.
culture: Under Arlong's rule, the islands' culture was one of fear and survival. Villagers paid tribute to live, never knowing when violence would strike. Nami's sacrifice to buy the village's freedom became local legend. After liberation, the culture slowly recovered its roots of fishing, agriculture, and tangerine farming. Bellemere's memory and her message about chosen family became central to the community's healing.
transportation: Small fishing boats connect the Conomi Islands. Travel within islands is by foot. The Going Merry navigated carefully through the waters to reach Arlong Park.

traditions: Visits to Bellemere's grave with tangerines

notablePeople.name: Nami
notablePeople.description: The brilliant navigator forced to work for Arlong for eight years. Finally freed when Luffy destroyed Arlong Park and officially joined the crew.

notablePeople.name: Arlong
notablePeople.description: The saw-nosed shark fish-man who preached fish-man superiority while terrorizing humans. Former member of the Sun Pirates.

notablePeople.name: Bellemere
notablePeople.description: The former Marine and tangerine farmer who adopted Nami and Nojiko. Killed by Arlong when she couldn't pay tribute for all three of them.

notablePeople.name: Nojiko
notablePeople.description: Nami's adoptive older sister who supported her through everything. Runs the tangerine grove and keeps Bellemere's memory alive.

notablePeople.name: Genzo
notablePeople.description: The pinwheel-wearing sheriff who helped raise Nami and Nojiko. Tried desperately to stop Nami from her dangerous path.

notablePeople.name: Hatchan
notablePeople.description: The six-armed octopus fish-man, Arlong's most loyal but least intelligent crew member. Later reforms and opens a takoyaki stand.

notablePeople.name: Kuroobi
notablePeople.description: Arlong's serious, disciplined officer and Fish-Man Karate master who fought Sanji.

notablePeople.name: Chew
notablePeople.description: Arlong's lip-powered water gun user and third officer who fought Usopp.

subLocations.name: Arlong Park Fortress
subLocations.description: The massive fortress Arlong built to assert fish-man dominance. Destroyed by Luffy.

subLocations.name: Cocoyasi Village
subLocations.description: The peaceful village where Nami grew up, terrorized by Arlong for eight years.

subLocations.name: Bellemere's Grave
subLocations.description: The hilltop grave where Bellemere is buried, overlooking the tangerine grove and ocean.
notableFeatures: Where Nami said goodbye before leaving

subLocations.name: Tangerine Grove
subLocations.description: The tangerine orchard Bellemere cultivated and Nojiko now maintains. Nami's connection to home.

items.name: Bellemere's Tangerines
items.description: The tangerines that represent family, sacrifice, and home. Nami always carries some from the grove.

items.name: Arlong's Saw-Sword (Kiribachi)
items.description: Arlong's massive saw-toothed sword that matches his saw-shark nose.

items.name: 100,000,000 Berry Deal
items.description: Arlong's false promise to sell the village's freedom for 100 million berries.

items.name: Nami's Maps
items.description: The countless charts Nami was forced to draw for Arlong, showcasing her genius.

factions.name: Cocoyasi Village Citizens
factions.description: The resilient islanders who endured Arlong's tyranny and supported Nami's sacrifice.

factions.name: Arlong Pirates
factions.description: Fish-man supremacists from the Grand Line who terrorized East Blue.

factions.name: Corrupt Marines
factions.description: Marines bribed by Arlong to ignore his crimes and maintain his rule.

events: Straw Hats pursue Nami to Cocoyasi Village
Arlong betrays the 100 million berry deal

quickFacts: Where Nami officially joined the Straw Hats
Terrorized by Arlong for eight years
Where Luffy got his first bounty (30,000,000)
Home of the famous tangerine grove
Symbol of chosen family over blood

videos.title: Nami Asks Luffy for Help
videos.description: The heartbreaking moment when Nami finally asks Luffy for help, cementing their bond.

videos.title: Luffy Destroys Arlong Park
videos.description: Luffy's rage-fueled destruction of Arlong Park and declaration of Nami's freedom.

videos.title: Bellemere's Sacrifice
videos.description: The tragic but beautiful story of Bellemere choosing to die rather than deny her children.
